name: gsb-ai-data-driven-case09-api-exchange-rate-job-poc
description: Case 09: API exchange rate ingestion - S3 JSON source with flatten to S3 gzip CSV
codeGenConfigurationNodes: {"node-1":{"S3JsonSource":{"AdditionalOptions":{"EnableSamplePath":false,"SamplePath":""},"Exclusions":[],"Name":"S3 JSON Source - case09_api_exchange_rate","OptimizePerformance":false,"OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[]}],"Paths":["s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/preparing/case09_api_exchange_rate/"],"Recurse":true}},"node-2":{"SparkSQL":{"Inputs":["node-1"],"Name":"SQL Query","OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[]}],"SqlAliases":[{"Alias":"myDataSource","From":"node-1"}],"SqlQuery":"SELECT NULLIF(TRIM(currency_id), '') AS CURRENCY, NULLIF(TRIM(country), '') AS COUNTRY, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(CAST(buying_sight AS STRING)), '') AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS BUYING_SIGHT, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(CAST(buying_transfer AS STRING)), '') AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS BUYING_TRANSFER, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(CAST(selling AS STRING)), '') AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS SELLING, CURRENT_DATE() AS VERSION_DATE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS ETL_UPDATE_DATE FROM myDataSource"}},"node-3":{"S3DirectTarget":{"AutoDataQuality":{"IsEnabled":false},"Compression":"gzip","Format":"csv","Inputs":["node-2"],"Name":"S3 Gzip CSV Target - case09_api_exchange_rate","NumberTargetPartitions":"0","PartitionKeys":[],"Path":"s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/staging/case09_api_exchange_rate/load/","SchemaChangePolicy":{"EnableUpdateCatalog":false}}}}
